runTitle: GitLab production release smoke - v8.12.79 P24 all-scope average routing
coveredSurfaces: Current main deployed through semver tag v8.12.79
GitLab tag deploy pipeline 2562464239 completed successfully
Vercel production /api/version reports 8.12.79 and commit dc08d19d15a7594fd4146407b3e00a42ee7224b1
Cloud Run ai-engine /health reports version 8.12.79 and routesReady true
Cloud Run latestReadyRevision ai-engine-00585-kvp receives 100% traffic
P24 all-scope average metric routing fix is included in deployed release commit range
Cloud Run and Vercel usage/cost guardrails remain normal after deploy
skippedSurfaces: Full conversational browser QA was not rerun because P24 was already covered by deterministic parser/evidence tests and this smoke run validated production propagation
Full dashboard visual matrix was not rerun; no frontend UI behavior changed in this release
Authenticated Cloud Run /monitoring admin query was not run; unauthenticated protection and /health were sufficient for this release smoke

expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab tag pipeline, Vercel production version, Cloud Run revision, health checks, and free-tier guardrails were verified.
P24 deterministic parser/evidence regression tests, contract tests, AI Engine full suite, and release smoke cover the changed risk surface.
The release fixes a deterministic current-metric evidence routing gap and verifies the fix is deployed to Cloud Run.
Vercel /api/health, Cloud Run /health, revision metadata, protected /monitoring behavior, and usage checks were captured.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage checked after v8.12.79 production deploy: effective=19.2319 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, chargeCount=17052.
Cloud Run guardrails intact: maxScale=1, concurrency=16, timeout=300s, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, cpu-throttling=true, latestReadyRevision=ai-engine-00585-kvp.

notes: State triage: symptom=deployment drift, scope=cloud-run, root cause=P24 fix existed on main but production still served v8.12.78/49cf8d62, next step=deploy-and-qa.
